---
title: "Conferences"
---

## Slides

### International Symposium of Forecasting 2026
**Isotonic Quantile Regression Averaging 
for uncertainty quantification 
of electricity price forecasts**
<a href="content/slides/isf-2026.pdf" class="bi bi-file-earmark-arrow-down-fill" download aria-label="Download"></a>

## Posters

### NetSci 2026 
**How stubborn anticonformists drive social hysteresis - quenched anticonformity in the multistate *q*-voter model on networks** <a href="content/posters/netsci-2026.pdf" class="bi bi-file-earmark-arrow-down-fill" download aria-label="Download"></a>

<div class="pdf-container">
  <iframe src="content/posters/netsci-2026.pdf" class="pdf-frame" scrolling="yes"></iframe>
</div>

### IC2S2 2025
**Depolarizing Power of Anticonformity** <a href="content/posters/ic2s2-2025.pdf" class="bi bi-file-earmark-arrow-down-fill" download aria-label="Download"></a>

<div class="pdf-container">
  <iframe src="content/posters/ic2s2-2025.pdf" class="pdf-frame" scrolling="yes"></iframe>
</div>
